timeline.description: A cataclysmic event that struck the central Pangea, creating the Badlands and ending the primordial world.
A millennium of post-apocalyptic chaos following the Great Death. Survival was the only law.
The rise of disparate martial powers; a brutal period of constant border shifts and tribal dominance.
A brief but significant era of unification or specific cultural dominance preceding the rise of the Ancients.

timeline.era: The Golden Age of the Ancients
timeline.description: The peak of the elder races (Secluded, Greys, Ice Ancients, and Dark Ones). High magic and architectural wonders defined this period.

timeline.era: The Age of the Eight Kingdoms
timeline.description: The splintering of Ancient power into eight major mortal-led sovereign entities.

timeline.era: The Tyranny of Irin the Sage
timeline.description: A dark century where a Dread Knight of the Forgotten Kingdoms enslaved Leonoria, enforcing a global reign of terror.
The collapse of Irin's empire followed by a long, multi-generational conflict that laid the foundations for modern borders.
The current nameless era characterized by the stabilization of the 28 core cultures and their respective states.
